title: ononis columnae subsp. minutissima
intro: Ononis columnae subsp. minutissima, also known as the minute spiny restharrow or little restharrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Ononis columnae subsp. minutissima has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in digestive issues. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, and can be consumed in its raw or dried form to reap its medicinal benefits.
